scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n dev,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && set "ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/" && set "ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder" && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.electron:build:win:portable: npm run build && set "ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/" && set "ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder" && electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.electron:build:win:all: npm run build && set "ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/" && set "ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron" && set "ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder" && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 && node scripts/cleanup-old-release-files.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run typecheck
